Text.Page:
Here, take these. Craft leatherwright's cuirasses and bring them to me when you've finished.

If they pass inspection, we'll put them to good use.

Nice, very nice. This is fine work, .

I'd say these are ready for delivery. Deliver them to Prefect Paka in Popolion. He needs all the armor he can get.
You've got the design and kits. Talk to the crafting vendors if you need additional materials.

Nice armor! Tough, supple—very good.

Hey! This better not be someone I know!
